subject: docs: update PROJECT_DOCS templates and README for Tailwind + DaisyUI
body:
PROJECT_DOCS.md had HTML templates using old Pico CSS classes (card-grid,
badge-subtle, card-links, tool-item, <article> tags). Updated to current
Tailwind + DaisyUI markup so new projects are added with correct classes.

README.md now mentions caramellatte/coffee theme names.

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: css-framework-migration
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BuRYF1Mc9N3Eh18WUDsNbX
title: update PROJECT_DOCS templates and README for Tailwind + DaisyUI
